mapper.insert: insert into user(username, display_name, avatar, avatar_source, status) values(#{username}, #{displayName}, #{avatar}, #{avatarSource}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, username, display_name, avatar, avatar_source, status, create_time, update_time from user order by id desc
select auth_key from user_auth where user_id = #{userId} and auth_type = 'wechat' limit 1
mapper.update: update user set avatar = #{avatar}, avatar_source = #{avatarSource}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{userId}
update user set display_name = #{displayName}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{userId}
update user set status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{userId}
